info.description: REST API for the PiGrow indoor-grow automation backend. Every route is mounted under `/api`. The PiGrow client dashboard, Raspberry Pi MQTT bridge, and external integrators consume these endpoints.
info.title: PiGrow Server API

get.description: Returns every Raspberry Pi hub known to the server, ordered newest-first by `createdAt`.

post.description: Creates a new controller record, or — if a controller with the same `macAddress` already exists — returns the existing record (sensors are only seeded on the first create).

ipAddress.description: The local network IP of the active Raspberry Pi client node

macAddress.description: Valid standard network MAC Address string (e.g., b8:27:eb:bf:d3:42)

name.description: Descriptive label for identifying the tent deployment location

sensors.description: Optional list of physical sensors to seed on the controller at registration time. Sensors can be added, updated, or removed later via the /api/sensors endpoints.

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

get.summary: Get one controller with its topology
get.description: Returns the controller plus its active grow cycle (with the active phase and its DAY/NIGHT environments), its persistent device inventory, and its sensor inventory.

404.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

patch.description: Lightweight endpoint the Pi client calls periodically to announce ONLINE / OFFLINE status.

post.summary: Skip the currently active grow phase
post.description: Atomically ends the active phase, re-computes each phase's `startAt`/`endAt`, and activates the next phase.

parameters.name: today
parameters.description: Optional override for today's date (YYYY-MM-DD). Useful for timezone-correct skip operations; defaults to server UTC today.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique UUID identifier of the grow cycle

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

404.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

post.summary: Extend the currently active grow phase
post.description: Atomically extends the active phase and shifts every subsequent phase's dates.

days.description: Whole days to add to the currently active phase

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique UUID identifier of the grow cycle

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

404.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

post.description: Atomically ends the active phase, marks the cycle inactive, and persists the final phase dates.

parameters.name: today
parameters.description: Optional override for today's date (YYYY-MM-DD). Useful for timezone-correct skip operations; defaults to server UTC today.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique UUID identifier of the grow cycle

get.summary: List phases for a grow cycle
get.description: Returns every phase attached to the cycle, ordered by `order` ascending.

dayDurationMinutes.description: Duration in minutes (0..1440) of the photoperiod DAY. NIGHT = 1440 - this. Default 1080 = 18h.

dayStartMinutes.description: Minutes from midnight (0..1440) when the photoperiod DAY begins. Default 360 = 06:00.

durationDays.description: Target runtime duration in days for this phase

growCycleId.description: The unique ID of the grow cycle this phase belongs to

isActive.description: Flags whether this phase is currently running

name.description: e.g., Early Veg, Late Bloom, Flush

startAt.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this phase actively started execution

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

patch.description: Atomically deactivates every other phase in the same grow cycle and marks this one as `isActive: true`.

404.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

get.summary: Get DAY + NIGHT environment rows for a phase
get.description: Returns both period rows for the phase. A missing period comes back as `null` so the FE can tell DAY exists and NIGHT doesn't (or vice versa).

put.description: Creates the row if it doesn't exist, replaces it if it does. Omitted fields are cleared to `null`.

get.summary: List telemetry readings for a grow cycle
get.description: Returns every persisted telemetry row for the cycle, newest first, with the originating sensor summary.

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

get.description: Returns the most recent telemetry row per physical sensor on the cycle.

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

get.summary: Telemetry readings within a time range

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

post.description: Persists a telemetry row. In the normal MQTT flow, the server resolves the sensor's controller's active grow cycle and writes one row per reading; readings with no active grow cycle are dropped with a warning.

growCycleId.description: The grow cycle this telemetry reading belongs to

sensorId.description: The physical sensor that produced this reading

400.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses

schema.description: Generic JSON error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses
